action.reasoning: Observation: Dual model 0.6023 test bal_acc, up from 0.5228. Weak on bobcat/squirrel/empty. Analysis: Frozen backbones help generalization but rare classes need more weight. Decision: Improve class weighting, add mixup, try partial unfreezing of backbone, train 25 epochs.
